name: Varanasi Prayagraj Tour
overview: Explore the best of Varanasi, Prayagraj with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Varanasi: Arrival at Varanasi Airport/Railway station company representative ass
itinerary.description: Varanasi: Arrival at Varanasi Airport/Railway station company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel & refresh drive to visit Sarnath which is known as the place where Lord Budda delivered his first sermon to his disciples. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Varanasi sightseeing: Early morning visit the popular ghat of Ganges through boa
itinerary.description: Varanasi sightseeing: Early morning visit the popular ghat of Ganges through boat ride of Varanasi, peoples offering water to Sun God along with taking a holy dip in the Ganges river water, back to hotel & after breakfast proceed to visit Bharat Mata temple, Vishwanath Temple, Sankat Mochan (Hanuman Temple), Annapurna Temple, Banaras Hindu University (BHEU) & Manas Mandir. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Varanasi to Prayagraj (120 Kms
itinerary.description: Varanasi to Prayagraj (120 Kms. 3 Hrs.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Prayagraj & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Prayagraj sightseeing: After breakfast, drive to visit Holi Triveni Sangam, Hanu
itinerary.description: Prayagraj sightseeing: After breakfast, drive to visit Holi Triveni Sangam, Hanuman Temple, Anand Bhawan & Alopi Devi Temple. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Prayagraj departure transfer: After breakfast checkout from the hotel & drop you
itinerary.description:
Prayagraj departure transfer: After breakfast checkout from the hotel & drop you at airport/railway station with sweet memories.
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Meals
